name: ECO SCIENCE SOLUTIONS, INC.
business: The Company develops and commercializes HERBO, a cloud-based ERP and accounting platform, and HERBO Pay, an integrated financial services and payment platform. Its target customers are businesses in regulated and operationally complex industries. The Company did not generate revenue during the fiscal year ended January 31, 2026 and began limited customer onboarding after year end.

exposures.sentence: The Company's primary technology platforms are HERBO, a cloud-based enterprise resource planning (ERP) and accounting platform, and HERBO Pay, an integrated financial services and payment platform.

catalysts.event: Began limited onboarding of initial paying customers
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to year end, the Company began limited onboarding of initial paying customers.
